node.text:
More than a collection–it’s a visual diary designed to bring your space to life with heritage in every hue. @temi.coker brings a pulse of Nigerian culture from Lagos to your living room with vibrant rugs, vases, pillows & throws. Exclusively available at @walmart!​

Shop the collection at the link in bio!​

forget the flowers, gift the jumbo plush

comment PLUSH for a DM to shop 3-foot-tall plushies

node.text: Sparky is giving holiday magic with recs & reviews. Bearded dragon is giving… absolutely nothing. 😍✨

for our short and sweet queen ✨

comment PRETZELS for a DM to shop. 🎥: @baileyyfinch

node.text:
the @aerosmith X @yungblud album “One More Time” is has hit shelves ☠️🪽

the Walmart Exclusive CD comes with a poster ft. Yungblud, Steven Tyler and Joe Perry.

shop in-store or at the link in bio 🖤
Moments like these make the season feel brighter 🤗🎄#AngelTrees have arrived!! 🫶

node.text:
That’s a wrap on Walmart Delivers! 🚚✨ Thanks for an unforgettable ride. You love it. We have it. Who Knew? 

Stay tuned for more Walmart experiences in the future!
